screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows a particle source wired through Stern–Gerlach analyzers to particle counters on a light experiment board.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has an experiment preset chooser and a Reset All button that returns the simulation to its starting state.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Choose an experiment, then fire atoms through the analyzers and watch the counters.

a11y.currentDetails: The simulation is in its initial state.

controls.expectedValuesCheckbox: Show expected-value lines on the counters
controls.watchCheckbox: Watch which path each atom takes
controls.analyzerToolboxItem: Add an analyzer to the board
controls.magnetToolboxItem: Add a magnet to the board
controls.counterToolboxItem: Add a counter to the board

preferences.title: Simulation
preferences.su3EnableDescription: Adds SU(3) (Gell-Mann λ₁–λ₈) as a third quantum system.
